# Implementation Completeness Checklist: Core Package, Public API & Reproducibility Baseline

**Purpose**: Validate that the implementation fully covers all functional requirements, edge cases, success criteria, and design contracts defined in the feature specification.
**Created**: 2026-02-13
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md) | [plan.md](../plan.md) | [data-model.md](../data-model.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Configuration (FR-001, FR-014)

- [ ] CHK001 - NeatSharpOptions exposes `PopulationSize` (default 150), `Seed` (nullable int), `Stopping`, `Complexity`, and `EnableMetrics` (default true) [FR-001, Spec §Key Entities]
- [ ] CHK002 - StoppingCriteria exposes nullable `MaxGenerations`, `FitnessTarget`, and `StagnationThreshold` [FR-001, data-model.md §StoppingCriteria]
- [ ] CHK003 - ComplexityLimits exposes nullable `MaxNodes` and `MaxConnections` [FR-001, data-model.md §ComplexityLimits]
- [ ] CHK004 - PopulationSize is validated with `[Range(1, 100_000)]` [FR-014, data-model.md]
- [ ] CHK005 - StoppingCriteria fields validated: must be > 0 if set [FR-014, data-model.md §StoppingCriteria]
- [ ] CHK006 - FitnessTarget validated: must be finite if set [FR-014, data-model.md §StoppingCriteria]
- [ ] CHK007 - ComplexityLimits fields validated: must be > 0 if set, null is valid for unbounded [FR-014, data-model.md §ComplexityLimits]
- [ ] CHK008 - Cross-field validation: at least one stopping criterion must be non-null; error message is "At least one stopping criterion is required (MaxGenerations, FitnessTarget, or StagnationThreshold)." [FR-014, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK009 - Configuration validation occurs at run start (ValidateOnStart via DI Options pattern) and reports clear, actionable errors [FR-014]
- [ ] CHK010 - NeatSharpOptions is configured via the DI Options pattern (`IOptions<NeatSharpOptions>`) [FR-002, Spec §Key Entities]

## Evolution Entry Point (FR-002, FR-018)

- [ ] CHK011 - INeatEvolver interface exists with `RunAsync(IEvaluationStrategy, CancellationToken)` returning `Task<EvolutionResult>` [FR-002, contracts/INeatEvolver.cs]
- [ ] CHK012 - CancellationToken parameter is optional (has default value) [FR-018, contracts/INeatEvolver.cs]
- [ ] CHK013 - On cancellation, RunAsync returns best genome found so far with `WasCancelled = true` instead of throwing `OperationCanceledException` [FR-018, Spec §Clarifications]
- [ ] CHK014 - NeatEvolverExtensions provides convenience overload `RunAsync(Func<IGenome, double>, CancellationToken)` [contracts/INeatEvolver.cs]
- [ ] CHK015 - NeatEvolverExtensions provides convenience overload `RunAsync(Func<IGenome, CancellationToken, Task<double>>, CancellationToken)` [contracts/INeatEvolver.cs]
- [ ] CHK016 - NeatEvolverExtensions provides convenience overload `RunAsync(IEnvironmentEvaluator, CancellationToken)` [contracts/INeatEvolver.cs]
- [ ] CHK017 - NeatEvolverExtensions provides convenience overload `RunAsync(IBatchEvaluator, CancellationToken)` [contracts/INeatEvolver.cs]

## Evaluation Strategies (FR-003, FR-004, FR-005)

- [ ] CHK018 - IEvaluationStrategy interface exists with `EvaluatePopulationAsync(IReadOnlyList<IGenome>, Action<int, double>, CancellationToken)` [FR-003, contracts/IEvaluationStrategy.cs]
- [ ] CHK019 - EvaluationStrategy static class provides `FromFunction(Func<IGenome, double>)` factory method [FR-003, contracts/IEvaluationStrategy.cs]
- [ ] CHK020 - EvaluationStrategy static class provides `FromFunction(Func<IGenome, CancellationToken, Task<double>>)` factory method [FR-003]
- [ ] CHK021 - IEnvironmentEvaluator interface exists with `EvaluateAsync(IGenome, CancellationToken)` returning `Task<double>` [FR-004, contracts/IEnvironmentEvaluator.cs]
- [ ] CHK022 - EvaluationStrategy provides `FromEnvironment(IEnvironmentEvaluator)` factory method [FR-004, contracts/IEvaluationStrategy.cs]
- [ ] CHK023 - IBatchEvaluator interface exists with `EvaluateAsync(IReadOnlyList<IGenome>, Action<int, double>, CancellationToken)` [FR-005, contracts/IBatchEvaluator.cs]
- [ ] CHK024 - EvaluationStrategy provides `FromBatch(IBatchEvaluator)` factory method [FR-005, contracts/IEvaluationStrategy.cs]
- [ ] CHK025 - All EvaluationStrategy factory methods throw `ArgumentNullException` on null input [contracts/IEvaluationStrategy.cs]

## Genome Abstraction

- [ ] CHK026 - IGenome interface exists with `Activate(ReadOnlySpan<double>, Span<double>)`, `NodeCount`, and `ConnectionCount` [contracts/IGenome.cs, data-model.md §IGenome]
- [ ] CHK027 - IGenome uses span-based signatures (ReadOnlySpan/Span) for activation [contracts/IGenome.cs]

## Results & Output (FR-006, FR-007, FR-008, FR-010)

- [ ] CHK028 - Champion record exists with `Genome` (IGenome), `Fitness` (double), `Generation` (int) [FR-006, data-model.md §Champion]
- [ ] CHK029 - PopulationSnapshot record exists with `Species` (IReadOnlyList\<SpeciesSnapshot\>), `TotalCount` (int) [FR-007, data-model.md §PopulationSnapshot]
- [ ] CHK030 - SpeciesSnapshot record exists with `Id` (int), `Members` (IReadOnlyList\<GenomeInfo\>) [FR-007, data-model.md §SpeciesSnapshot]
- [ ] CHK031 - GenomeInfo record exists with `Fitness` (double), `NodeCount` (int), `ConnectionCount` (int) [FR-007, data-model.md §GenomeInfo]
- [ ] CHK032 - RunHistory record exists with `Generations` (IReadOnlyList\<GenerationStatistics\>), `TotalGenerations` (int) [FR-008, data-model.md §RunHistory]
- [ ] CHK033 - GenerationStatistics record exists with `Generation`, `BestFitness`, `AverageFitness`, `SpeciesCount`, `Complexity` (ComplexityStatistics), `Timing` (TimingBreakdown) [FR-008, FR-012, data-model.md §GenerationStatistics]
- [ ] CHK034 - ComplexityStatistics record exists with `AverageNodes` (double), `AverageConnections` (double) [FR-008, data-model.md §ComplexityStatistics]
- [ ] CHK035 - TimingBreakdown record exists with `Evaluation`, `Reproduction`, `Speciation` (all TimeSpan) [FR-008, data-model.md §TimingBreakdown]
- [ ] CHK036 - EvolutionResult record exists with `Champion`, `Population`, `History`, `Seed` (int, non-nullable), `WasCancelled` (bool) [FR-006/007/008/010/018, data-model.md §EvolutionResult]
- [ ] CHK037 - EvolutionResult is an immutable record and does not implement IDisposable [Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK038 - EvolutionResult.Seed is non-nullable int (auto-generated when NeatSharpOptions.Seed is null) [FR-010, data-model.md]

## Reproducibility (FR-009, FR-010)

- [ ] CHK039 - NeatSharpOptions.Seed defaults to null (triggers auto-generation) [FR-010, data-model.md §NeatSharpOptions]
- [ ] CHK040 - Auto-generated seed is recorded in EvolutionResult.Seed for later reproduction [FR-010, Spec §Acceptance Scenario 2.3]
- [ ] CHK041 - XML documentation on NeatSharpOptions.Seed describes auto-generation behavior (null → Random.Shared.Next()) [FR-010, tasks.md T030]
- [ ] CHK042 - XML documentation on EvolutionResult describes reproducibility contract (same seed + config → identical results on CPU) [FR-009, tasks.md T031]

## Observability & Reporting (FR-011, FR-012, FR-013, FR-019)

- [ ] CHK043 - Library supports structured log events via ILogger when host logging configuration enables the relevant log level [FR-011]
- [ ] CHK044 - Metrics (best fitness, average fitness, species count, complexity) are available per generation via GenerationStatistics when EnableMetrics is true [FR-012]
- [ ] CHK045 - When EnableMetrics is false, RunHistory.Generations is empty and TotalGenerations still reflects actual count [FR-013, data-model.md §RunHistory Notes]
- [ ] CHK046 - No logging or metrics overhead is incurred when reporting is disabled [FR-013]
- [ ] CHK047 - IRunReporter interface exists with `GenerateSummary(EvolutionResult)` returning string [FR-019, contracts/IRunReporter.cs]
- [ ] CHK048 - Default RunReporter implementation produces human-readable summary including champion fitness, generation count, seed, species count, and cancellation status [FR-019, data-model.md §IRunReporter Notes]

## Exception Handling

- [ ] CHK049 - NeatSharpException base class exists, inherits from Exception, supports message and InnerException constructors [data-model.md §NeatSharpException]
- [ ] CHK050 - When fitness function throws during evaluation, exception is wrapped in NeatSharpException and propagated to the caller [Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §Clarifications]

## DI Registration & Developer Experience

- [ ] CHK051 - ServiceCollectionExtensions provides `AddNeatSharp(IServiceCollection, Action<NeatSharpOptions>?)` extension method [plan.md §DI Registration]
- [ ] CHK052 - AddNeatSharp registers INeatEvolver as resolvable service [tasks.md T028]
- [ ] CHK053 - AddNeatSharp registers IRunReporter → RunReporter (Singleton lifetime) [tasks.md T044]
- [ ] CHK054 - Options registration includes ValidateDataAnnotations and ValidateOnStart [tasks.md T028]
- [ ] CHK055 - IValidateOptions\<NeatSharpOptions\> implementation performs cross-field validation (at least one stopping criterion) [tasks.md T028]
- [ ] CHK056 - AddNeatSharp registration is compatible with ILogger injection (no explicit ILogger registration required — host provides it) [tasks.md T039]

## Edge Cases (Spec §Edge Cases)

- [ ] CHK057 - Invalid configuration (e.g., population size of zero, negative seed) is rejected with actionable validation error [FR-014, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK058 - When stopping criteria are met on the very first generation, run completes normally and returns champion from generation 0 [Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK059 - When no stopping criteria are configured, configuration validation rejects with: "At least one stopping criterion is required." [Spec §Edge Cases]

## Cross-Platform & Packaging (FR-015, FR-016, FR-017)

- [ ] CHK060 - Library multi-targets net8.0 and net9.0 via `<TargetFrameworks>net8.0;net9.0</TargetFrameworks>` [FR-017]
- [ ] CHK061 - Test project also multi-targets net8.0 and net9.0 [plan.md §Project Structure]
- [ ] CHK062 - Solution builds with zero warnings on both target frameworks (TreatWarningsAsErrors enabled) [FR-015, tasks.md T045]
- [ ] CHK063 - All tests pass on both net8.0 and net9.0 targets [FR-015, tasks.md T046]
- [ ] CHK064 - Library is packageable without requiring consumers to install additional native dependencies [FR-016]
- [ ] CHK065 - Directory.Build.props centralizes LangVersion 13, Nullable enable, ImplicitUsings enable, TreatWarningsAsErrors true [plan.md §Project Structure]

## Success Criteria (SC-001 through SC-005)

- [ ] CHK066 - Quickstart documentation enables a developer to go from zero to a running evolution in under 10 minutes [SC-001, quickstart.md]
- [ ] CHK067 - Quickstart code samples compile against the implemented public API surface (namespace imports, type names, method signatures match) [SC-001, tasks.md T047]
- [ ] CHK068 - API supports deterministic reproduction: same seed + config produces identical champion and run history on CPU [SC-002, FR-009]
- [ ] CHK069 - Library builds and all tests pass on both Windows and Linux [SC-003, FR-015]
- [ ] CHK070 - A complete evolution run (configure, execute, retrieve champion) requires fewer than 20 lines of user code [SC-004, quickstart.md]
- [ ] CHK071 - Structured logs and metrics contain sufficient information to reconstruct generation-by-generation progress without access to the original run object [SC-005]

## Data Model Completeness

- [ ] CHK072 - All result entities (Champion, PopulationSnapshot, RunHistory, EvolutionResult, GenerationStatistics, etc.) are immutable records [data-model.md §Relationship Summary]
- [ ] CHK073 - Namespaces mirror folder structure: NeatSharp.Configuration, NeatSharp.Evaluation, NeatSharp.Evolution, NeatSharp.Genetics, NeatSharp.Reporting, NeatSharp.Exceptions, NeatSharp.Extensions [plan.md §Structure Decision]
- [ ] CHK074 - Nullable reference types enabled project-wide [plan.md §Constraints]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline when an item reveals a gap
- Items are numbered sequentially (CHK001–CHK074) for easy reference
- Traceability: each item references the FR, SC, spec section, or design doc it traces to
